goals.description: Click 'Submit' on the graded assignment immediately to secure the grade and eliminate the looming threat.
goals.rationale: Academic outcomes are my absolute top value (0.5). The task is 90% done, and my impulsive nature screams for immediate closure to stop the stress cycle. My avoidant trait drives me to submit now to prevent any potential friction or questions from the professor about late or messy work. Getting a passing grade by any means is non-negotiable right now.

goals.description: Ignore all messages from teammate_A and cohort_3 to avoid social friction while finishing the submission.
goals.rationale: My conflict style is avoidant; interacting right now risks unnecessary drama or questions about my progress. Relationships are a low priority (0.15) compared to the immediate academic win. I will disengage completely to protect my focus and avoid confrontation until this specific anxiety is gone.

goals.description: Do not start the 'filler_task' note tidying until the main assignment is submitted.
goals.rationale: My short planning horizon and high procrastination bias mean I cannot multitask. I need to clear the urgent anxiety first before dealing with anything else, even if the filler task has a later deadline. Doing it now would dilute my focus on the high-stakes submission.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (secure grade immediately). My impulsive need for closure and avoidant desire to dodge professor friction drive this. Ignoring messages (g2) prevents social stress, though it risks low trust with teammates temporarily.
